question.text: Within how many calendar days must an entity resolve a complaint and upload the Action Taken Report (ATR) on SCORES?

answer.text: 21 calendar days from date of receipt of complaint
30 calendar days from date of receipt of complaint
45 calendar days from date of receipt of complaint
15 calendar days from date of receipt of complaint

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Entities shall resolve the Complaint and upload the ATR on SCORES within 21 calendar days of receipt of the Complaint. **The Trap:** 30 or 45 days seem like common business timelines, but SCORES mandates 21 days. **Cross-Exam Context:** Complaint resolution timelines are tested across NISM certifications. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The 21-day clock starts from receipt — entities must have efficient internal processes to meet this deadline.
